name: valentines_exchange_06
description: Valentine's Day gift exchange at daycare - text only, no attachments

input.subject: Valentine's Day Exchange - Feb 13th
input.snippet: We will be having our Valentine's Day gift exchange on Friday, February 13th
input.body_text:
Dear Families,

We will be having our Valentine's Day gift exchange on Friday, February 13th!

Please bring goodies or valentines for 12 students in our class. Please note our classroom is a nut-free zone, so no nuts or nut products in any treats please.

The children are so excited for this special day!

Thank you,
Ms. Rodriguez
KinderCare Pre-K Room

events.title: Valentine's Day Gift Exchange at KinderCare

notes: Text-only email, no attachments. Action required because parent must prepare valentines.
